top_signals.title: Total Oil Trading Gain Doubled to About $1 Billion Last Quarter
top_signals.summary: TotalEnergies SE’s oil trading profits doubled to about $1 billion in the first quarter as the energy giant went on a crude buying spree in the run-up to the Iran war, Chief Executive Officer Patrick Pouyanné said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK issues largest penalty for financial sanctions breaches since Russia’s 2022 illegal invasion of Ukraine
top_signals.summary: The United Kingdom has imposed its largest ever penalty for a breach of Russian financial sanctions since the 2022 invasion of Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Three Iranian tankers exit U.S. blockade for first time in months as shipowners eye Hormuz in 'wary disbelief'
top_signals.summary: At least three Iranian tankers carrying nearly five million barrels of crude oil have exited the U.S. Navy blockade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 'BOJ shadow governor' Bessent pushed for rate hike
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Vercel Brings New Agent Framework, Full-Stack Capabilities, and Enterprise Controls to Its Agentic Infrastructure Platform
top_signals.summary: As agents become the primary way software is built and deployed, Vercel connects its frontend, backend, and agent tooling into a single platform for shipping and running agents at scale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold Holds Monday’s Gains as Markets Await Clarity on U.S.-Iran Deal - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Gold Holds Monday’s Gains as Markets Await Clarity on U.S.-Iran Deal  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Patch Tuesday, May 2026 Edition
top_signals.summary: Artificial intelligence platforms may be just as susceptible to social engineering as human beings, but they are proving remarkably good at finding security vulnerabilities in human-made computer code. That reality is on full display this month with some of the more widely-used software makers -- including Apple, Google, Microsoft, Mozilla and Oracle -- fixing near record volumes of security bugs, and/or quickening the tempo of their patch releases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Abercrombie & Fitch begins selling third-party shoe brands in latest bid to chase growth
top_signals.summary: Abercrombie & Fitch's explosive growth has slowed, leading the apparel retailer to expand into new categories to boost sales
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says SpaceX investors aren't buying earnings — they're buying Elon Musk
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SpaceX investors are betting on Elon Musk's vision and track record, rather than the company's current earnings power.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Exclusive: Iran deal includes $300 billion fund, more than half of which already committed, source says - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Exclusive: Iran deal includes $300 billion fund, more than half of which already committed, source says  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mortgage rates are now falling but demand is still weaker
top_signals.summary: A mixed week for mortgage rates resulted in less demand from both current homeowners and potential homebuyers.

top_signals.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
top_signals.summary: Lawmakers in both houses of Congress are demanding answers from the U.S. Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) after KrebsOnSecurity reported this week that a CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and a vast trove of other agency secrets on a public GitHub account. The inquiry comes as CISA is still struggling to contain the breach and invalidate the leaked credentials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: GenNx360 Capital Partners Promotes Pratik Rajeevan to Partner
alerts.summary: GenNx360 Capital Partners (“GenNx360”), a New York City-based private equity firm investing in U.S. lower middle market industrial services and business services companies, is thrilled to announce the promotion of Pratik Rajeevan to Partner. Pratik has significant transaction experience having invested in over ten platform companies and 30 add-on investments during his tenure at GenNx360. [...]

alerts.title: Options Technology Offers Immediate Access to the Texas Stock Exchange (TXSE)
alerts.summary: Options Technology, the leading managed IT services and technology solutions provider, today announced that it now offers immediate access to the Texas Stock Exchange (TXSE), delivering market data and order routing capabilities to clients from day one. The Texas Stock Exchange is the only exchange that built its own core infrastructure from the ground up [...]
